summary: Completed testing FX Broker system with three NEW features implemented: Math captcha for approve/reject operations, MT5 Number and CRM Customer ID fields in client form, and multi-currency transaction support with auto USD conversion. Backend API fully functional (25/25 tests passed). Frontend features visually confirmed with minor session management issues during extended testing.

integration_issues.issue: Session expires quickly during extended UI interactions causing logout during testing
integration_issues.impact: Users may get logged out during multi-step operations, affecting extended UI testing
integration_issues.workaround: Login works consistently for individual operations, backend API remains stable

passed_tests: Admin login with admin@fxbroker.com / admin123 credentials
Accountant login with accountant@fxbroker.com / accountant123 credentials
Backend API endpoints: 25/25 tests passed (NEW tests included)
NEW FEATURE: MT5 Number and CRM Customer ID fields in client creation API
NEW FEATURE: MT5 Number and CRM Customer ID fields visible in client form UI with proper labels and placeholders
NEW FEATURE: Multi-currency transaction creation with AED base currency
NEW FEATURE: Auto-conversion from AED to USD (2000 AED = $540 USD at 0.27 rate)
NEW FEATURE: Treasury accounts display balance_usd field for USD conversion
Client CRUD operations with new MT5 and CRM fields (MT5123456, CRM-001)
Treasury accounts show multi-currency balances with USD equivalents
Accountant Dashboard shows 105 pending transactions for approval
Dashboard statistics updated with treasury balance conversions
Transaction form supports base_currency and base_amount fields
Currency conversion rates working (AED=0.27, EUR=1.08, etc.)
Seed data creation and user authentication
action_item_for_main_agent: Session management during extended operations could be improved. The Math Captcha feature is implemented in the code (MathCaptcha component in AccountantDashboard.js) but could not be fully UI-tested due to session expiry. All backend APIs and core UI features are working correctly.
